sql_array: CREATE TABLE rdf_data (id INT, subject VARCHAR(255), predicate VARCHAR(255), object VARCHAR(255), graph VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO rdf_data VALUES (4, NULL, 'http://example.org/predicate4', 'http://example.org/object4', NULL);
SELECT id, subject, predicate, object FROM rdf_data WHERE subject < 'http://example.org/subject3' AND DB.DBA.TTLP(file_to_string_output('./tmp/data.ttl'), '', graph, 0) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rdf_data GROUP BY graph HAVING COUNT(subject) < 3;
SELECT id, subject, predicate, object FROM rdf_data WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rdf_data r2 WHERE r2.object IS NULL) < 2 AND DB.DBA.TTLP(file_to_string_output('./tmp/data.ttl'), '', graph, 0) < 3;

SELECT subject, COUNT(*) AS subject_count FROM rdf_data GROUP BY subject HAVING subject_count < (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rdf_data WHERE object IS NOT NULL) HAVING subject < 'http://example.org/subject4';
SELECT DISTINCT subject FROM rdf_data WHERE subject < 'http://example.org/subject5' AND DB.DBA.TTLP(file_to_string_output('./tmp/data.ttl'), '', graph, 0) IS NOT NULL ORDER BY subject DESC;
